title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The US dominates AI chips, models, and applications but lags in power infrastructure for data centers. The analysis attributes this to fragmented governance versus China's centralized energy strategy, which supports 25,000+ miles of ultra-high-voltage transmission lines and the Eastern Data Western Compute initiative. Workarounds by Google, Meta, OpenAI, and AWS through behind-the-meter deals and off-grid plants are examined.
